game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **DYSMANTLE:** Players control a survivor in a post-apocalyptic open world using a virtual joystick for movement and a tap-to-attack button for melee combat against various creatures, each with distinct attack patterns and health pools (e.g., 50-200 HP). The core mechanic involves breaking "over 99% of all objects" in the environment by repeatedly tapping them with the appropriate tool (e.g., axe for wood, pickaxe for stone), yielding raw materials like wood, metal, and fabric, which are stored in a finite inventory. These materials are then used at crafting stations to create permanent weapons, tools, outfits, and consumables, with new recipes unlocking as the player levels up through combat and exploration, or by finding blueprints. Progression is driven by clearing monster-infested areas to establish safe outposts, which serve as respawn points and fast travel locations, and by completing quests that unravel the island's mysteries, ultimately working towards escaping the island. The game features a persistent health bar and stamina bar, with health regenerating slowly out of combat and stamina consumed by attacking or sprinting, requiring players to manage resources and strategically engage enemies.
game_info.description: You are a survivor in a post-apocalyptic wasteland. Your mission is to escape the island by clearing monster-infested zones, gathering resources from destructible objects, and crafting better equipment. Break objects to collect materials, defeat enemies to gain experience, and establish outposts to secure safe zones. Manage your health and stamina carefully as you explore, craft, and fight your way to freedom.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Attack with your current weapon (consumes stamina)
Z: Interact with objects to break them or use crafting stations
Shift: Sprint (consumes stamina while moving)
Enter: Start the game
Esc: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction testing. Validates that the player can move around the world, interact with objects to gather resources, and the inventory system works correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player around the map in a pattern that explores different areas. Interact with various destructible objects to test resource gathering. Monitor inventory updates and position changes.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves through the game world, interacts with objects, gathers resources, and inventory updates correctly. No collision errors or stuck positions occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition testing. Implements an optimal strategy to complete the game by clearing all zones, defeating enemies, crafting necessary equipment, and escaping the island.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically gather resources from nearby objects, craft basic weapons and tools, defeat enemies to gain experience and clear zones, establish outposts, upgrade equipment progressively, and finally reach and activate the escape point.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player successfully gathers resources, crafts equipment, defeats all enemies in required zones, establishes outposts, and reaches the escape point, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state.

TEST_3.test_description: Combat mechanics testing. Validates attack patterns, enemy AI behavior, damage calculations, health/stamina management, and death conditions.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Engage enemies deliberately, testing different attack timings and stamina management. Allow some damage to test health regeneration. Test both winning combat encounters and losing scenarios.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Combat system functions correctly with proper damage calculations, stamina consumption, health regeneration, enemy AI responses, and appropriate game over conditions when health reaches zero.
